assertions.reason: Keyboard-only navigation moved through interactive controls, showed a visible focus indicator, activated a control with Enter, and closed the resulting panel with Escape.
evidence: After pressing Tab on the root view, focus landed on the FILTERS button with outline "rgb(0, 212, 255) solid 2px"; additional Tab presses moved focus to INTEL and Close.
Focusing Watchlist and pressing Enter opened a Watchlist panel with a visible heading; pressing Escape closed the panel and returned focus to the Watchlist button.

interactiveChecks.action: Pressed Tab three times on the root view.
interactiveChecks.observed: Focus advanced across FILTERS, INTEL, and Close, and the focused FILTERS control showed a bright cyan outline.
A Watchlist panel opened with a visible "Watchlist" heading.

interactiveChecks.action: Pressed Escape with the Watchlist panel open.
interactiveChecks.observed: The Watchlist panel closed and focus returned to the Watchlist button.
